title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Vision Express India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Vision Express India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Vision Express India family as a SEO Specialist in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Vision Express India:
Vision Express India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vision Express India!
